<thought>
O agente estĂ¡ na posiĂ§Ă£o (linha7, coluna4) voltado para o norte. A cĂ©lula Ă  frente Ă© lava (L), impossibilitando movimento. Ă€ esquerda hĂ¡ uma parede (#), Ă  direita hĂ¡ chĂ£o (.). Para prosseguir, Ă© necessĂ¡rio girar no sentido horĂ¡rio para ficar voltado para o leste e entĂ£o poder mover-se para a cĂ©lula segura Ă  direita.

<action>

<thought>
I am facing east, but the cell in front is a wall. The only safe adjacent cell is to the north, which is a floor. I need to turn counter-clockwise to face north before moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is lava, and the left cell is a wall. The only safe adjacent cell is to the right (east), which is floor. To move toward the goal, I need to turn clockwise to face east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The current observation is identical to the first one, meaning I have returned to the initial orientation after two turns. I am at the bottom center facing north. The cell directly ahead is floor, the left cell is lava, and the right cell is a wall. The goal is not visible in this local view. To explore new areas and potentially reach the goal, I should move forward into the safe floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing east, with a floor cell directly ahead. The left cell is lava and the right cell is a wall. Moving forward will take me to a safe floor cell, continuing my exploration toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (0,2) in world coordinates, facing north. The cell directly north (y=3) is floor, safe to move into. The left cell is lava, right cell is a wall, and behind is unknown but we have been moving north. The goal is not visible yet, and moving forward will reveal more of the map. Therefore, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is floor (safe). Moving forward will lead to row5 col3, which is a floor cell. From there, we can proceed north again to row4 col3, then turn west to explore new areas. The goal is not visible yet, so exploration is needed.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly north is lava, east is a wall, so I cannot move forward or turn clockwise and move. The left cell is floor, so I will turn counter-clockwise to face west, then move into that safe cell to explore new areas.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at the top row, col5. From my current position, the cell directly north is floor (.), and the entire column north (col3) appears to be safe floor all the way to the top. I am currently facing west, so I need to turn clockwise to face north, then move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing north. Directly north is floor, but beyond that is a wall (#) one step further north. Moving forward would put me in a dead end. To the west is open floor (.), and the east is a wall. To explore new territory and potentially reach the goal, I should turn left (counter-clockwise) to face west, then move forward into the safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Directly north (forward) of my position is floor (.), and the entire column northward appears to be safe floor leading to the top row, where the goal is two columns to the east. Since forward is clear, I should move north.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The observation is identical to the previous one, but the cell directly north (forward) is floor (.) as seen in row6, column 4. Since our goal is north and then east, moving forward is the correct action to approach the goal. The previous FRENTE might not have been registered, so I will attempt the same action again.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly north (forward) is a floor cell. The path to the goal is to continue north along column 4, then east at row 3. Moving forward now is safe and progresses towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly north (forward) is floor (.), and the path north along column 3 is clear until row 3, then east to the goal. Moving forward is safe and progresses towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly north (forward) is floor (.), and the path ahead is clear north two steps then east to the goal. Moving forward is safe and progresses towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly north (forward) is floor (.) and the path north leads to a safe row with the goal to the east. Moving forward is safe and moves closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom center, facing north. The cell directly north is a wall (#). The goal (O) is two cells to the east, with a safe floor (.) in between. To move toward the goal, I need to face east. Turning clockwise will orient me east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing east, but the goal is directly north (two cells ahead) in the same column. The cell immediately north is floor (safe). Moving east would lead to lava blocking the path north later. Therefore, I should turn counter-clockwise to face north and then move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom center, facing north. The cell directly north is a wall (#), so moving forward is not possible. The goal O is two cells to the east, with a safe floor (.) in between. I should turn clockwise to face east, then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>The agent is facing north (up) and the goal is directly ahead two cells away with a safe floor in between. I will move forward.</thought>
<action>FRENTE</action>

<thought>The goal is directly ahead of me, one cell forward. I can reach it by moving forward.</thought>
<action>FRENTE</action>
